SELECT event_date, toStartOfWeek(event_date, 0, 'UTC') FROM test_dates WHERE event_date >= '2023-04-21 00:00:00';
SELECT t1.event_date, t1.week_start FROM (SELECT event_date, toStartOfWeek(event_date) as week_start FROM test_dates) as t1 WHERE week_start < toDateTime('2023-04-25 00:00:00');
SELECT a.event_date, b.week_start FROM (SELECT event_date FROM test_dates) as a JOIN (SELECT event_date, toStartOfWeek(event_date) as week_start FROM test_dates) as b ON a.event_date = b.event_date;
SELECT distinct toStartOfWeek(event_date) FROM test_dates GROUP BY toStartOfWeek(event_date);

WITH (SELECT AVG(duration) FROM (SELECT toStartOfWeek(event_date) AS week_start, count(*) AS duration FROM test_dates GROUP BY week_start)) AS avg_duration SELECT * FROM test_dates WHERE toStartOfWeek(event_date) < now();
SELECT toStartOfWeek(t.event_date) FROM (SELECT event_date FROM test_dates WHERE event_date >= '2023-04-20') t;
